full_text:
Sample selection for picking

TLS project 22/8

S074 (different hospital, clinical info to be updated)

Only 1 TLS with GC

S081

Would these be useful?

I think yes

S113

Quite organized TLSs, abundant immune aggregates

S076

Only this TLS with GC

S083

Not very well organized TLSs

S128

Not very well organized TLSs

One clear GC only

S095

Only this

S123

ManyTLSs, would these count as GCs?

S067

Many quite well organized

Hard to say about right figure with this resolution, but likely okay

S120

Clear GCs all around the sample, very strong candidate

S027

Many well organized

The right figure looks like a lymph node, since it seems to have a capsule. Would like to see the WSI. Could u ask Anna Laury´s opinion?
